quiz.question:
White plays Qg5. 

This puts some pressure on g7 but it is protected, so does White actually threaten something?

answers.text: Yes, White threatens a check with the knight with Nh6+.

feedback.text: After the knight checks on the h6 square, the pawn on f7 will fall.
There actually is a threat here.

distractors.text: Yes, Black's central pawn is under attack. Bxd4 is a threat.

feedback.text: Yes, in a sense, but there's a bigger threat.

distractors.text: Yes, there are checkmate tactics in the air.

feedback.text: Even after Ba3, Black can defend against the checkmate.
